name: Pirate Island Mini Golf VR
short_description: Pirate Island Mini Golf VR is a single or multi-player virtual reality experience set in a scenic tropical island. There are four, 18-hole courses placed throughout the island, with multiple challenges and enhancements that can be unlocked to mix up game play to keep you coming back for more.
detailed_description:
In the Works...

Development continues on Pirate Island Mini Golf - VR. With the completion of the multiplayer Scallywags update, the focus is now on improving the environment. Most notably, the distinct lack of actual Pirates on the island!

This update, which is still being worked on, developed, and tested internally prior to releasing to the testing branch, will add a full crew compliment to the island. This, in addition to a number of environmental updates and cosmetic upgrades, we hope will make Pirate Island a living, breathing world.

Keep an eye on our forums for additional information. Hope to see you on the island soon!


About the Game

Welcome to Pirate Island Mini Golf - VR!



As of the Scallywag Update, Pirate Island Mini Golf VR is now a multiplayer player virtual reality experience set in a scenic tropical island. Up to four of your friends can play any of the four, 18-hole courses placed throughout the old pirate stronghold. Each course has multiple challenges and enhancements that can be unlocked, to mix up game play and keep you coming back for more.

So come to Pirate Island! Tune in the radio to a music style of your choice and play a couple rounds. Take a swim in the ocean to find hidden, unique sea shells that unlock new content, or just watch the fireflies come out as the sun sets over the horizon.

Pirate Island Mini Golf VR - Available for purchase on Steam.
